schema.description:
Accepts a single item or an array of items when sent as application/json.
For text/plain content, use the [Payload Parser](/docs/tagoio/devices/payload-parser/) to normalize the data into TagoIO JSON format.

group.description: Unique grouping ID for your data. Widgets often group by this.

unit.description: Provide a unit of measurement to the data. Most widgets will display the unit.

metadata.description: Can be attached to the data to influence widget behavior and store additional information.

unit.description: Provide a unit of measurement to the data. Most widgets will display the unit.

metadata.description: Can be attached to the data to influence widget behavior and store additional information.

oneOf.description: Accepts a single item or an array of items.
oneOf.title: DeviceDataArray

schema.title: DeviceData

schema.description: Raw text data that will be processed by the device's Payload Parser to normalize into TagoIO JSON format.
